description: Foreign Financial Institution establishing a correspondent banking relationship subject to FFIEC enhanced screening requirements
parsed_text:
CORRESPONDENT BANKING DUE DILIGENCE — FOREIGN FINANCIAL INSTITUTION
Institution Name: Nordvik Savings and Commercial Bank AS
Customer Type: Business (Foreign Financial Institution)
Country of Incorporation: Norway
Swift/BIC: NVKBNOK2XXX
Regulatory License: Finanstilsynet (Norwegian FSA) — License No. NO-BANK-XXXX4411
Primary Business Address: Dronning Eufemias Gate 30, 0191 Oslo, Norway
US Contact Phone: +47-22-555-0177   Email: correspondent@nordvik.example
Business Activity: Commercial banking, retail deposits, corporate lending, trade finance
Source of Funds: Customer deposit base, interbank lending, bond issuance
Expected Monthly Activity: $9,500,000

FFIEC ENHANCED CORRESPONDENT BANKING SCREENING
PATRIOT Act Section 312 (Enhanced Due Diligence for Foreign Financial Institutions): APPLICABLE.
Certification of Non-Shell Bank Status: Received — signed by CEO Bjorn Andersen, dated 2025-10-20. Nordvik Bank is not a shell bank; it maintains a physical presence in Norway as evidenced by its Finanstilsynet license and published annual report.
Correspondent Account Agreement: Signed 2025-11-01.

OWNERSHIP
Beneficial Owner: Nordvik Group ASA (publicly listed, Oslo Stock Exchange — ticker NVKB). No individual beneficial owner holds 25% or more. Regulated entity exemption per 31 CFR 1010.230(e)(2) applied.
Control Person: Ingrid Sorensen, Head of International Banking

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear.
EU Consolidated Sanctions List: Clear.
UN Security Council List: Clear.
Norway FATF Status: Norway is a FATF member — low-risk jurisdiction.
PEP Status: Not applicable at institution level; Ingrid Sorensen — no PEP flag.
Adverse Media: No adverse media. Nordvik Bank holds a clean regulatory record per Finanstilsynet public registry.
Correspondent Due Diligence Questionnaire (Wolfsberg): Completed and reviewed.

RISK ASSESSMENT
PEP Status: No
Risk Rating: Low
CDD Level: Enhanced (required for all foreign correspondent banking relationships per policy)
Compliance Notes: PATRIOT Act Section 312 checklist completed. Payable-through account assessment: Not applicable — this is a standard correspondent account. Annual review scheduled.
Review Date: 2025-11-18   Reviewer: Alicia Pemberton

expected_json.customer_name: Nordvik Savings and Commercial Bank AS
expected_json.occupation_or_business: Commercial banking, retail deposits, corporate lending, trade finance
expected_json.source_of_funds: Customer deposit base, interbank lending, bond issuance
